summary: 2 Maccabees retells portions of the Maccabean revolt with emphasis on martyrdom, divine justice, and the resurrection of the righteous.
historical_context: The text highlights spiritual themes within the political revolt and includes reflections on prayer for the dead and resurrection hope.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Persecution exposes the depth of faith.
mirror_water_fire.fire: Martyrdom transforms suffering into eternal witness.
